pageContext.name: Lux: The Lady of Luminosity Figure Pen
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Capcom are excited to present the Lux: Lady of Luminosity Figure Pen Collectible Figure!  From the competitive and popular video game League of Legends, this mage stands over 8.5' tall in an iconic and recognizable pose! This figure fits just as well in a collection room or at a desk, doubling as a pen once removed from the base.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
